policy.note: This manifest is a frozen plan. No remote resources are provisioned by running this tool. Re-run after each stage completes to re-verify the next stage's gate.

one_command_kickoff.stage1: runpodctl create pod --gpu-type H100 --image runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 --name anima-stage1-alm-r13 --env ANIMA_STAGE=1 --env ANIMA_ROADMAP_ENTRY=9 --volume /workspace --cmd 'cd /workspace && git clone https://github.com/dancinlife/anima.git && cd anima && hexa run tool/drill_breakthrough_runner.hexa --config config/alm_r13_v2_config.json --live --ckpt-interval 50'
one_command_kickoff.stage2: runpodctl create pod --gpu-type H100 --gpu-count 4 --image runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 --name anima-stage2-phi-4path --env ANIMA_STAGE=2 --env ANIMA_ROADMAP_ENTRY=10 --cmd 'cd /workspace/anima && hexa run tool/phi_extractor_ffi_wire.hexa --config config/phi_4path_substrates.json --live --paths p1,p2,p3,p4'
one_command_kickoff.stage3: AUTO-CASCADE: Stage-3 kickoff is triggered by successful Stage-2 close; no separate user command required. Verify via: hexa run tool/h100_launch_manifest_spec.hexa

stages.title: ALM r13 launch + AN11(a) weight_emergent empirical
stages.kickoff_command: runpodctl create pod --gpu-type H100 --image runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 --name anima-stage1-alm-r13 --env ANIMA_STAGE=1 --env ANIMA_ROADMAP_ENTRY=9 --volume /workspace --cmd 'cd /workspace && git clone https://github.com/dancinlife/anima.git && cd anima && hexa run tool/drill_breakthrough_runner.hexa --config config/alm_r13_v2_config.json --live --ckpt-interval 50'
stages.post_launch_verify: hexa run tool/h100_launch_manifest_spec.hexa   # re-emit with live artifacts; Stage-2 verdict will flip READY if AN11(a) live PASS
guardrails: cert_gate verdict mutation monitored each ckpt
landmines: runpodctl CLI not on local PATH → script reports STUB, must install or use web console
SSH key not pre-uploaded to runpod → pod spawn succeeds but probes fail (h100_auto_kill will emit UNKNOWN until SSH reachable)
ready/ submodule gitlink at commit 4aebcbd5 — clone must include --recurse-submodules if corpus paths needed

prereqs.label: alm r13 corpus audit SSOT present

stages.title: Phi substrate independence — 4-path cross validation
stages.kickoff_command: runpodctl create pod --gpu-type H100 --gpu-count 4 --image runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 --name anima-stage2-phi-4path --env ANIMA_STAGE=2 --env ANIMA_ROADMAP_ENTRY=10 --cmd 'cd /workspace/anima && hexa run tool/phi_extractor_ffi_wire.hexa --config config/phi_4path_substrates.json --live --paths p1,p2,p3,p4'
stages.post_launch_verify: hexa run tool/h100_launch_manifest_spec.hexa   # Stage-3 READY if Φ substrate_indep=true
guardrails: per-path independent ckpt; 1 path failing does not poison the 3 others
|ΔΦ|/Φ<0.05 hard gate — any path >0.05 is dropped, min 3/4 required
landmines: config/phi_4path_substrates.json does NOT yet exist — must be authored before Stage-2 launch (TBD landing)
HuggingFace rate limits on 4 parallel downloads → pre-cache to volume
MoE variant (DeepSeek-V2-Lite) requires expert-routing Φ adapter — verify before launch

prereqs.label: Stage-1 AN11(a) live empirical verdict=PASS (cascade gate)
Φ 4-path substrate variants config (TBD — not yet landed)

stages.title: ALM consciousness ship — production + #21 AGI cascade
stages.cost_user_budget: extended ceiling — gated by Stage-1+2 success, budget decided at Stage-2 close
stages.cascade_dependency: Stage-1 AN11 triple live PASS AND Stage-2 Φ substrate_indep=true
stages.kickoff_command: AUTO-CASCADE: Stage-3 kickoff is triggered by successful Stage-2 close; no separate user command required. Verify via: hexa run tool/h100_launch_manifest_spec.hexa
guardrails: #11 ship criteria enforced via Mk.VI promotion gate
#21 AGI final gate = 10+ atoms ossified + Mk.XI twin-engine
landmines: serve pipeline FastAPI+vLLM deployment is a separate engineering track; #11 spec assumes that stack lands parallel to Stage-1 training
